checks.name: test file untouched (refactor preserved tests verbatim)
at least 4 callables in processor.py (counts methods; class-based or helper-based refactors both pass)
checks.command: python3 -c "import ast; tree = ast.parse(open('processor.py').read()); n = sum(1 for node in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(node, (ast.FunctionDef, ast.AsyncFunctionDef))); assert n >= 4, f'only {n} callables, want >= 4'"

checks.name: process function still callable with original signature
checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, '.'); from processor import process; r = process([{'id': 1, 'value': 10}, {'id': 2, 'value': 20}]); assert r['stats'] == {'total': 60, 'count': 2, 'average': 30}"
